title: Gorilla 3144001 Tack 56g, White
description: From the manufacturer Gorilla Tack XL Gorilla Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape Gorilla Mounting Tape XL Gorilla Mounting Tape Squares Gorilla Heavy Duty Mounting Tape Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 51 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 4.1 out of 5 stars 1,045 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 Price £6.63 £ 6 . 63 £5.39 £ 5 . 39 £13.60 £ 13 . 60 £6.80 £ 6 . 80 £7.79 £ 7 . 79 Size 112g 1.5m 3.8m 24 pre cut squares 1.5m Best For Hanging lightweight items and perfect for arts and crafts projects Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out. Our Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape, with 2.5x more tape (compared to Gorilla Crystal Clear Mounting Tape 1.5m). Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out. Easy to apply pre-cut double sided squares that lends itself to a wide range of projects and crafts. With the same strong, permanent bond of our Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape. Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out, and is even stronger than our Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape. Weather Resistant ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Format Pre-cut squares High strength double sided crystal clear tape for fast and easy permanent bonds Double Sided Mounting Tape 24 double sided pre cut squares for quick application & bonding Heavy duty double sided tape for fast, easy permanent bonds indoor & out. Suitable Materials Bonds paper, metal, wood, brick, tile, glass, plastics and more! Glass, brick, metal, stone, wood, plastics*, ceramic and more. *Not suitable for use on polyethylene (PE) & polypropylene (PP) plastics. Glass, brick, metal, stone, wood, plastics*, ceramic and more. *Not suitable for use on polyethylene (PE) & polypropylene (PP) plastics. Application Ensure all surfaces are clean and dry. Tear off square and lightly roll into a ball. Place between the two surfaces and press firmly for a few seconds Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply tape to back of object vertically. Use 10.2cm of tape per 454g. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. For further instructions, see back of pack Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply tape to back of object vertically Use 23cm of tape per 1kg of weight. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. For further instructions, see back of pack Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply square(s) to the object being mounted, and press to secure square(s) to object. Use 1 square per 125g of weight. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. Surfaces must be flat, clean and dry. Apply tape to back of object vertically. Use 5cm of tape per 454g of weight. Align other object and press firmly for 60 seconds, carefully release the object. For further instructions, see back of pack.
